name: Nissin Shoji Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nissin Shoji Co.,Ltd. engages in the sale of petroleum and by-products in Japan. It also sells petrochemicals and synthetic resins; and automotive parts and tires, as well as manufactures and sells liquefied petroleum gas. In addition, the company engages in automobile damage compensation insurance agency, real estate rental, and restaurant businesses; selling plastic molding machinery and accessories; and leasing automobile and automobile supplies. Further, it sells electrolytic reduction water conditioners and cartridges, as well as electrolytic reduced water; food, daily commodities, and other household goods; ultra-high brightness micro prism reflective materials; and appliances and eco-friendly products. Additionally, the company offers agency services related to telecommunications equipment; and telecommunication services, as well as generates and distributes electric power. It also manufactures and sells agricultural materials; and beverages, including soft drinks. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
